ddl.value: NOT ("item_id" IS NOT NULL AND "container_id" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: comment_target_exclusivity

ddl.value: ("item_id" IS NOT NULL OR "container_id" IS NOT NULL OR "parent_id" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: comment_must_have_target_or_parent

ddl.value: NOT ("container_id" IS NOT NULL AND "location_id" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: item_location_exclusivity

ddl.value: NOT ("quantity" IS NOT NULL AND "quantity_description" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: item_quantity_exclusivity
